title: SaaS Starter
description: A clean, precision-crafted landing page for modern SaaS products.
tagline: Launch your SaaS with a high-converting landing page.

seo.title: SaaS Starter Landing Page
seo.description: A production-ready SaaS landing page template built with Astro, Tailwind CSS and TypeScript.

hero.title: Build better software, faster
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform that helps teams ship features with confidence. No setup required.

features.title: Lightning fast
features.description: Static generation and zero JS by default for exceptional Core Web Vitals.

features.title: Fully responsive
features.description: Looks great on every device, from mobile to ultra-wide desktop screens.

features.title: SEO optimized
features.description: Built-in sitemap, Open Graph, JSON-LD and semantic HTML out of the box.

features.title: Accessible
features.description: WCAG 2.2 AA compliant with keyboard navigation and screen-reader support.

features.title: TypeScript
features.description: Strictly typed components and content schemas for a maintainable codebase.

features.title: Easy to customize
features.description: Tailwind CSS design tokens and reusable sections make branding simple.

steps.title: Connect your data
steps.description: Import from your existing tools in minutes with our native integrations.

steps.title: Automate workflows
steps.description: Build repeatable processes with a visual, no-code workflow builder.

steps.title: Ship with confidence
steps.description: Monitor performance, collaborate with your team and iterate faster.

testimonials.quote: This platform cut our release cycle in half. The ROI was visible within the first month.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: Finally a tool that our designers and developers can actually agree on.
testimonials.author: Marcus Johnson

testimonials.quote: The analytics alone saved us countless hours of manual reporting.
testimonials.author: Elena Rossi

pricing.name: Starter
pricing.description: Perfect for side projects and small teams.

pricing.name: Pro
pricing.description: For growing teams that need more power.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes, every paid plan starts with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

faq.question: Can I change plans later?
faq.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade or cancel at any time from your billing settings.

faq.question: Do you offer refunds?
faq.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with the product.

faq.question: Is my data secure?
faq.answer: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We are SOC 2 Type II compliant.

cta.title: Ready to ship faster?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of teams already building better products with our platform.
